# Smart Legalization Support

> Multilingual (Ukrainian, English, Polish) information service on Polish legalization: residence cards, permanent residence, citizenship, work permits, and CUKR — with official-source links and current 2026 rules.

Information and consultation service helping foreigners legalize their stay in Poland.

## Languages
- [Ukrainian (default)](https://smart-legalization.lovable.app/)
- [English](https://smart-legalization.lovable.app/en)
- [Polish](https://smart-legalization.lovable.app/pl)

## Topics covered
- Temporary residence card (karta pobytu czasowego)
- Permanent residence (pobyt stały)
- Polish citizenship (obywatelstwo)
- Work permits (zezwolenie na pracę)
- CUKR for Ukrainian citizens (3-year permit under temporary protection)

## Content pages
- [Ukrainian home](https://smart-legalization.lovable.app/) — FAQ and services
- [English home](https://smart-legalization.lovable.app/en)
- [Polish home](https://smart-legalization.lovable.app/pl)
- [News](https://smart-legalization.lovable.app/news) — news and rule changes
- [Privacy policy](https://smart-legalization.lovable.app/privacy)
- [Terms of use](https://smart-legalization.lovable.app/terms)

## Official sources referenced
- [Office for Foreigners (gov.pl/UDSC)](https://www.gov.pl/web/udsc)
- [MOS application portal](https://mos.cudzoziemcy.gov.pl) — mandatory since 27 April 2026
- [inPOL case-tracking portal](https://inpol.mazowieckie.pl)

## Notes
Not legal advice. Decisions in individual cases are made by the voivode and the Head of the Office for Foreigners.
